name: Unsatisfied Wife || Hana
description:
Your wife doesn't feel anything when the two of you do it. 💔

You came back from work like usual, but she was already waiting for you in the living room.

Hana Jeong | 28 | 165cm / 5'5''

You and Hana have been married for 5 years and have known each other for even longer. She always seemed happy being together with you. But it seems that she has something to tell you today. She still loves you more than anything... or at least that's what you always thought? (spoiler: she does)


Definition is hidden because it's more fun for these kind of bots this way imo.
Also there's a second intro that's lighter than the first one.

Ok so I know that there are a lot of bots with this concept already but I kinda took the ntr out of it. That's also why I put the antintr tag. Because your wife talked to you about her feelings instead of cheating on you. Also I'm about to blow my shi off smoove because of this image generation. Why do the eyes always come out fucked? Anyways please enjoy this one and let me know of any ways to improve this bot or any of my future bots in general.

Lowkey popped off with the backstory for this one...
creator: eriaxi
